candidate_phases.completion_note: Forecast engine scope registered with allowed inputs, allowed outputs, forbidden outputs, scope rules, and claim boundary.
candidate_phases.goal: Define what the forecast engine is allowed to read and what it must not claim.
Inventory usable signals from intake, pattern, negative-space, phase-map, cockpit, provenance, and audit artifacts.
Create review-only watchlists for missing categories, missing source types, stale sources, and silent expected signals.
Create bounded forecast-candidate records using descriptive trends and gaps only.
Turn forecast candidates into human-review queues with claim boundaries.
Audit continuity, claim safety, reproducibility, and boundary preservation.

claim_boundary: This workplan registers a bounded forecast and negative-space review engine only. It does not claim prediction, production monitoring, alerts, autonomous action, causal inference, or truth resolution.
core_goal: Use existing intake, pattern, negative-space, math-overlay, cockpit, claim-gauntlet, provenance, and audit layers to produce bounded forecast candidates and missing-signal review prompts without claiming prediction, truth, alerts, or autonomous action.
purpose: Upgrade the workstation from command-center visibility into forward-looking bounded forecast scaffolding, negative-space monitoring, and review-priority suggestions.
